case_title: MELISSA L ELIA VS. THE WOMEN & CHILDREN CENTER FOR DEVELOPMENT, A CA.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIA, MELISSA L AS TO DEFENDANT THE WOMEN & CHILDREN CENTER FOR DEVELOPMENT, A CA. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE WOMEN & CHILDREN CENTER FOR DEVELOPMENT, A CA. CORP. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,299.00, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $1299.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
